== Overview ==
'''GSG''' was a Korean League of Legends team. They first came to prominence when they qualified for [[OnGameNet_The_Champions_Summer_2012|The Champions Summer 2012]] as '''RoMg'''.
== Trivia ==
* '''GSG''' stands for '''Gwangju Sansung Golf''' (광주 산성 골프).
